zh: 即心、肺、脾、肝、肾，合称为“五脏”。
en: The heart, lungs, spleen, liver and kidneys are together known as the five Zang-organs.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=3.3；zh_sentence_index=1；en_sentence_index=1；en_pdf_pages=65-66；zh_pdf_pages=411-411；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 奇恒之腑有六，即脑、髓、骨、脉、胆、女子胞。
en: Extraordinary Fu-organs, unlike ordinary ones, comprise six organs, namely, the brain, marrow, bone, vessel, gallbladder and uterus.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=3.5；zh_sentence_index=3；en_sentence_index=2；en_pdf_pages=66-66；zh_pdf_pages=411-411；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 心为神之居，主血脉，神是气血所化，故有神明之心。
en: The heart governs the vessels and blood circulation and the mind takes Qi-blood as its material basis.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=3.6；zh_sentence_index=3；en_sentence_index=3；en_pdf_pages=66-67；zh_pdf_pages=412-412；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 全身的血，都在脉中运行，依赖于心气的推动作用而输送到全身，发挥其濡养作用。
en: The normal circulation of all the blood in the vessels depends on the impulse of the heart-Qi, by which blood is transported to all parts of the body for nutritive purpose.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=3.7；zh_sentence_index=2；en_sentence_index=2；en_pdf_pages=67-67；zh_pdf_pages=412-412；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 脉，即血脉，又称经脉，为血之府。
en: The vessels, also called channels, are the house of blood.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=3.7；zh_sentence_index=5；en_sentence_index=4；en_pdf_pages=67-67；zh_pdf_pages=412-412；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 舌的功能是主司味觉和表达语言，其功能正常与否，有赖于心主血脉和心主神志的生理功能。
en: The tongue serves two main functions: that of discriminating tastes and that of aiding in speech, the performance of which depends on the heart's physiological functions in governing blood and vessels and in controlling mental activities.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=3.12；zh_sentence_index=2；en_sentence_index=3；en_pdf_pages=69-70；zh_pdf_pages=413-413；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 如心的功能正常，则舌体红活荣润，柔软灵活，味觉灵敏，语言流利。
en: Therefore, if the heart functions properly, the tongue must be ruddy-lustrous and soft-nimble, taste sensations keen and speech fluent.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=3.12；zh_sentence_index=4；en_sentence_index=5；en_pdf_pages=69-70；zh_pdf_pages=413-413；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 肺的主要功能是：主气、司呼吸，主宣发肃降，通调水道，朝百脉而主治节，以辅佐心脏调节气血的运行。
en: Their main jobs are to dominate Qi and respiration, fulfil the dispersing and descending functions, participate in regulating water metabolism, and communicate with numerous vessels to achieve coordination of functional activities of the whole body, assisting the heart in maintaining normal circulation of Qi-blood.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=3.13；zh_sentence_index=4；en_sentence_index=5；en_pdf_pages=70-70；zh_pdf_pages=413-414；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 肺上通喉咙，外合皮毛，开窍于鼻，在志为忧，在液为涕。
en: The lungs, which extend upward to the larynx and open into the nose, are related outward to the skin and its hairs.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=3.13；zh_sentence_index=5；en_sentence_index=6；en_pdf_pages=70-70；zh_pdf_pages=413-414；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 宗气的生成，主要依靠肺吸入的清气与脾胃运化的水谷精气相结合。
en: Pectoral Qi is mainly produced by combination of fresh air inhaled into the lungs with food essence derived from the spleen and stomach.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=3.14；zh_sentence_index=6；en_sentence_index=5；en_pdf_pages=70-71；zh_pdf_pages=414-414；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 肺的呼吸功能健全与否，直接影响着宗气的生成，同时也影响着全身之气的生成。
en: Whether or not the lungs function properly directly influences the formation of pectoral Qi and Qi of the whole body as well.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=3.14；zh_sentence_index=7；en_sentence_index=6；en_pdf_pages=70-71；zh_pdf_pages=414-414；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 肺的呼吸运动，是气的升降出入运动的表现，肺有节律地一呼一吸，对全身之气的升降出入运动起着重要的调节作用。
en: The breathing movement of the lungs itself is a manifestation of lifting-lowering and entering-exiting of Qi, in which the lungs play an important regulatory role by their rhythmical respiration.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=3.14；zh_sentence_index=8；en_sentence_index=7；en_pdf_pages=70-71；zh_pdf_pages=414-414；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 肺主一身之气，由于肺主呼吸，调节着全身的气机，所以血液的运行，亦赖于肺气的敷布和调节。
en: Since the lungs dominate Qi of the whole body and control respiration, the circulation of blood depends to a certain extent on the spread and coordination of the lung-Qi.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=3.17；zh_sentence_index=4；en_sentence_index=3；en_pdf_pages=73-73；zh_pdf_pages=415-415；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 由于肺主气属卫，具有宣发卫气、输精于皮毛等生理功能，所以肺与皮毛有着密切的关系。
en: Since the lungs dominate Qi and perform the functions of dispersing outward defensive Qi and sending the essence to the skin and vellus hairs, they are closely related to the skin and its hairs.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=3.20；zh_sentence_index=4；en_sentence_index=3；en_pdf_pages=74-74；zh_pdf_pages=416-416；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 肺的生理功能正常，则皮肤致密，御邪能力强。
en: When the lungs function normally, the skin becomes compact and body resistance enhanced.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=3.20；zh_sentence_index=5；en_sentence_index=4；en_pdf_pages=74-74；zh_pdf_pages=416-416；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 多余的水液，通过肺、肾等脏的气化作用，化为汗和尿排出体外。
en: The surplus fluids are turned into sweat and urine to be removed from the body under the functioning of the lungs and kidneys.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=3.24；zh_sentence_index=8；en_sentence_index=9；en_pdf_pages=76-77；zh_pdf_pages=417-417；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 因此，脾的运化水液功能健旺，就能防止水液在体内停滞，也就防止湿、痰、饮等病理产物的生成。
en: Thus, normal functioning of the spleen in this respect can prevent body fluids from accumulating and such pathological changes as dampness, phlegm and water-retention from occurring.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=3.24；zh_sentence_index=9；en_sentence_index=10；en_pdf_pages=76-77；zh_pdf_pages=417-417；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 若脾失升清，则水谷不能运化，气血生化无源，可出现神疲乏力、头目眩晕、腹胀、泄泻等病症。
en: On the contrary, dysfunction of the spleen leads to failure to transport-transform the nutrients from foodstuff regularly and failure to supply Qi-blood, thus giving rise to such symptoms as listlessness, weakness, dizziness, abdominal distension, and loose stool.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=3.25；zh_sentence_index=4；en_sentence_index=6；en_pdf_pages=77-78；zh_pdf_pages=418-418；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 若脾的运化功能减退，则气血生化无源，气血虚亏；气的固摄功能减退，而导致各种出血证。
en: In case of the spleen's dysfunction in transportation and transformation, the Qi-blood will be insufficient and the commanding action be reduced, thereby producing various kinds of chronic hemorrhage.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=3.26；zh_sentence_index=5；en_sentence_index=3；en_pdf_pages=78-78；zh_pdf_pages=418-418；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 肝的疏泄功能，主要表现在三个方面；一是调畅气机。
en: The liver's function of governing normal flow of Qiis threefold.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=3.32；zh_sentence_index=4；en_sentence_index=2；en_pdf_pages=81-83；zh_pdf_pages=420-420；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 肝的疏泄功能正常，则气机调畅，气血和调、经络通利，脏腑器官等的活动就处于正常状态。
en: If the liver functions properly in this respect, the normal functioning of Qi as well as Qi-blood, free flow of channels, and the proper functioning of Zang-Fu organs and other-structures will ensue as a result.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=3.32；zh_sentence_index=6；en_sentence_index=5；en_pdf_pages=81-83；zh_pdf_pages=420-420；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 肝的疏泄功能正常与否、对脾胃的升降功能有着很大的影响。
en: The proper functioning of the liver in governing normal flow of Qi greatly influences the lifting-lowering function of the spleen and stomach.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=3.32；zh_sentence_index=10；en_sentence_index=9；en_pdf_pages=81-83；zh_pdf_pages=420-420；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 如肝的疏泄功能异常，就会影响脾胃的升清和降浊功能，而出现肝气犯脾或肝气犯胃的病证。
en: For instance, dysfunction of the liver can impair the function of the spleen and stomach in lifting clear Qi and lowering turbid Qi, resulting in the symptoms due to an attack of the spleen or stomach by the hyperactive liver-Qi.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=3.32；zh_sentence_index=11；en_sentence_index=10；en_pdf_pages=81-83；zh_pdf_pages=420-420；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 情志活动，是属于心主神明的生理功能，但亦与肝的疏泄功能密切相关。
en: The emotional activities are chiefly dominated by the heart, but they are also closely related to the liver.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=3.32；zh_sentence_index=14；en_sentence_index=14；en_pdf_pages=81-83；zh_pdf_pages=420-420；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 肾的主要生理功能为藏精，主生长、发育、生殖，主水液代谢，主纳气。
en: The main functions of the kidneys are:(1) to store essence, (2) to dominate growth, development and reproduction, and (3) to govern water metabolism and reception of air.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=3.38；zh_sentence_index=3；en_sentence_index=3；en_pdf_pages=86-87；zh_pdf_pages=423-423；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 肾所藏之精，是人体生长、发育和生殖的主要物质基础，因此，肾的藏精功能减退，不仅可出现精关不固的遗精、滑泄等病证，还可因精气不足而影响人体的生长、发育及生殖机能。
en: Since the essence stored in the kidneys is the major material foundation for the body's growth, development and reproduction, hypofunction of the kidneys in storing the essence may not only lead to such symptoms as spermatorrhea, nocturnal emission and premature ejaculation due to unconsolidation of the kidney-Qi, but also impair normal growth, development and reproduction of the body resulting from deficiency of the kidney-essence.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=3.39；zh_sentence_index=10；en_sentence_index=7；en_pdf_pages=87-88；zh_pdf_pages=423-423；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 肾精充足、则骨髓充盈，骨骼充实健壮，肢体活动轻劲有力；反之，肾精不足，骨髓空虚，则会引起骨骼发育不良，如小儿囱门迟闭、骨软无力。
en: As a result, abundance of the kidney-essence leads to the plenitude of the bone marrow, resulting in the sturdy-robust skeleton and agile-powerful motions of the limbs.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=3.45；zh_sentence_index=3；en_sentence_index=2；en_pdf_pages=91-92；zh_pdf_pages=425-426；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 饮食物从口摄入，经过食管，通过贲门而进入胃中，由胃接受和容纳；饮食物在胃中，经过胃气和胃津的作用，初步消化成食糜，以便传入小肠作进一步的消化。
en: Under the actions of the stomach-Qi and stomach-fluid the food mass in the stomach is preliminarily digested into the chyme and then is carried into the small intestine to be further digested.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=3.53；zh_sentence_index=2；en_sentence_index=2；en_pdf_pages=96-96；zh_pdf_pages=428-428；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 因为水谷是气血生化之源，而气血是脏腑、器官功能活动的物质基础。
en: This is because of the fact that foodstuff is the source for the production of Qi-blood which is the material basis for vital functions of the Zang-Fu organs.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=3.53；zh_sentence_index=5；en_sentence_index=5；en_pdf_pages=96-96；zh_pdf_pages=428-428；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 胃的通降是受纳的前提条件，若胃气失于通降，多可造成胃气上逆，则可出现嗳气吞酸、恶心、呕吐、呃逆等症。
en: So failure of descending of the stomach-Qimay cause the adverse rising of the stomach-Qi. marked by belching with acid regurgitation, nausea, vomiting, hiccup, etc.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=3.55；zh_sentence_index=3；en_sentence_index=6；en_pdf_pages=97-97；zh_pdf_pages=428-428；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 胃气在人体具有重要意义，故在诊治疾病中，亦十分重视胃气，常把“保胃气”作为重要的治疗原则。
en: Clinically, doctors attach inuch importance to it and usually regard"preserving the stomach-Qi" as an important principle of treatment.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=3.56；zh_sentence_index=4；en_sentence_index=6；en_pdf_pages=97-98；zh_pdf_pages=429-429；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 小肠与心，在经脉上相互络属，构成表里关系。
en: The small intestine has the exterior-interior relation with the heart because of the interconnection between their channels
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=3.57；zh_sentence_index=3；en_sentence_index=3；en_pdf_pages=98-98；zh_pdf_pages=429-429；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 小肠的化物功能，是将经胃初步消化的饮食物，进一步进行消化，将水谷化为精微。
en: On the other hand, the function of the small intestine in digesting means that this organ further digests the foodstuff partially digested in the stomach and converts it into refined nutritious substances.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=3.58；zh_sentence_index=3；en_sentence_index=4；en_pdf_pages=98-99；zh_pdf_pages=429-429；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 因此，小肠泌别清浊功能异常，即可引起“清气在下”的泄泻病证。
en: For this reason, dysfunction of the small intestine may cause diarrhea resulting from "sinking of clearQi."
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=3.59；zh_sentence_index=4；en_sentence_index=9；en_pdf_pages=99-99；zh_pdf_pages=429-430；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 膀胱的病变，主要表现为尿频、尿急、尿痛；或小便不利，尿有余汤，甚则尿闭；或遗尿，甚则小便失禁等。
en: The disorder of the urinary bladder usually manifests itself by frequency and urgency of urination, urodynia, oliguria, dysuria, dribbling urination, even anuresis, enuresis. or incontinence of urine, and so on.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=3.63；zh_sentence_index=4；en_sentence_index=2；en_pdf_pages=100-101；zh_pdf_pages=430-431；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 焦与心包，经脉相互络属、构成表里关系。
en: It is exterior-interiorly related to the pericardium by their channels.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=3.64；zh_sentence_index=3；en_sentence_index=4；en_pdf_pages=101-101；zh_pdf_pages=431-431；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 如三焦水道不够通利，则肺、脾、肾等脏输布、调节水液的功能也难以实现。
en: If the water passages namely, Tri-Jiao, are blocked, the distributive and regulative functions of the lungs, spleen, kidneys and others are hard to fulfil.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=3.66；zh_sentence_index=6；en_sentence_index=3；en_pdf_pages=102-102；zh_pdf_pages=431-431；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 中焦，一般是指膈以下至脐以上的上腹部，包括脾、胃、肝、胆等脏腑。
en: The middle-Jiao refers usually to the epigastrium below the diaphragm and above the umbilicus, including such viscera as the spleen, stomach, liver and gallbladder.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=3.68；zh_sentence_index=1；en_sentence_index=1；en_pdf_pages=103-103；zh_pdf_pages=432-432；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 在病理上，如心有实火，可移热于小肠，引起尿少、尿热、尿痛等症；反之，如小肠有热，亦可循经上炎于心，可见心烦、舌赤，口质生疮等症。
en: Conversely, the pathogenic heat of the small intestine may bring about flaring-up of the heart-fire along its own channel, manifested by dysphoria, crimson tongue, oral ulceration and so on.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=3.74；zh_sentence_index=2；en_sentence_index=2；en_pdf_pages=106-106；zh_pdf_pages=433-433；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 胃属燥，脾属湿，胃喜润恶燥，脾喜燥恶湿。
en: The spleen corresponds to dampness, while the stomach to dryness.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=3.76；zh_sentence_index=4；en_sentence_index=7；en_pdf_pages=107-107；zh_pdf_pages=434-434；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 若肾气不足，气化失常，固摄无权，则膀胱之开合失度，可出现小便不利，或失禁，或遗尿、尿频等病症。
en: In case of sufficiency of the kidney-Qi, the kidneys fulfil their reserving function normally and the urinary bladder functions to open and close at the right moment. However, in case of insufficiency of the kidney-Qi, disturbance in Qi transformation will occur, followed by failure of the kidneys to fulfil their reserving function and by abnormal opening-closing of the urinary bladder, marked by oliguria or incontinence of urine, or enuresis, frequent urination, etc.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=3.78；zh_sentence_index=4；en_sentence_index=3；en_pdf_pages=108-109；zh_pdf_pages=434-435；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 心主血与肺主气的关系，即是气和血相互依存、相互为用的关系。
en: The link between these two Zang-organs embodies the interdependence and interaction between Qi and blood.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=3.79；zh_sentence_index=2；en_sentence_index=2；en_pdf_pages=109-109；zh_pdf_pages=435-435；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 在血液的生成方面：脾运正常，化生旺盛，血液充盈，则心有所主。
en: Therefore, the relation between the heart and the spleen can be manifested chiefly in two aspects: formation of blood and its circulation.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=3.80；zh_sentence_index=2；en_sentence_index=2；en_pdf_pages=110-110；zh_pdf_pages=435-435；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 同时，肝之疏泄正常，气机调畅，方能推动血液运行正常。
en: Meanwhile, only when the liver functions properly in controlling normal flow of Qi, accompanied by regular functioning of Qi, can the blood flow smoothly.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=3.81；zh_sentence_index=2；en_sentence_index=3；en_pdf_pages=111-111；zh_pdf_pages=435-436；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 在病理关系上，若肝不藏血，则心无所主，血液的运行必致失常。
en: Pathologically, inability of the liver to store blood leads to failure of the heart to govern blood, thus resulting in irregular flow of blood.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=3.81；zh_sentence_index=4；en_sentence_index=6；en_pdf_pages=111-111；zh_pdf_pages=435-436；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 在气的生成方面：依赖于肺的呼吸功能和脾的运化功能，肺所吸入的清气和脾胃所运化的水谷精气，是组成气的主要物质基础。
en: In the former case, owing to respiratory function of the lungs and transporting-transforming function of the spleen, fresh air inhaled in the lungs and food essence derived from the spleen and stomach provide the main material basis for the formation of vital Qi of the body.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=3.83；zh_sentence_index=2；en_sentence_index=2；en_pdf_pages=112-113；zh_pdf_pages=436-437；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 在病理上，脾气虚损时，常可导致肺气不足；脾失健运，津液代谢障碍，水液停滞，则聚而生痰、成饮，多影响肺的宣降，而出现喘咳多痰的病变。
en: As for pathological connections, insufficiency of the spleen-Qi usually brings about insufficiency of the lung-Qi; dysfunction of the spleen in transport leads to disorder of water metabolism and stagnancy of fluids, accumulated into phlegm and fluid-retention which mostly impair the dispersing and descending functions of the lungs, resulting in a morbid condition marked by dyspnea and cough with copious sputum.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=3.83；zh_sentence_index=5；en_sentence_index=5；en_pdf_pages=112-113；zh_pdf_pages=436-437；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 在水液代谢方面：肺为“水之上源”,肺通调水道的动能，有赖于肾的蒸腾气化；肾主水，亦有赖于肺的宣降和通调水道。
en: In regard to water metabolism the lungs, as "the upper source of fluid" rely upon the kidney-Qi for support (especially its steaming activity). Conversely, the kidneys which dominate metabolism of body fluids also require support from the lungs (especially their function in descending Qi and clearing water passages).
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=3.85；zh_sentence_index=2；en_sentence_index=2；en_pdf_pages=114-115；zh_pdf_pages=437-437；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 在病理上，肺失宣肃，通调水道失职，必累及于肾，而至尿少、甚则水肿；肾的气化失司，水气上泛，可见喘呼，或咳逆倚息不得平卧。
en: As to pathological changes, impairment of the dispersing and descending function of the lungs and their failure to clear and regulate water passages must affect the kidneys, thus giving rise to oliguria and even edema; while disturbance in functioning of the kidney-Qi with the retained fluid overflowing upward results in dyspnea, or gasping cough with inability to lie flat.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=3.85；zh_sentence_index=5；en_sentence_index=4；en_pdf_pages=114-115；zh_pdf_pages=437-437；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 此外，肝脾在血的生成、贮藏及运行等方面亦有密切关系。
en: Moreover, there is a close relation between the liver and spleen as far as formation, storage and circulation of blood are concerned.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=3.86；zh_sentence_index=5；en_sentence_index=5；en_pdf_pages=115-116；zh_pdf_pages=437-438；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 肝主疏泄，肾主封藏，两者相互制约、相反相成，此主要表现在月经和泄精等生理功能方面。
en: The liver governs normal flow of Qi and the kidneys, storage of essence, so both restrain and oppose each other and yet complement each other, all mainly manifested by such physiological functions as menstruation and seminal emission.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=3.87；zh_sentence_index=3；en_sentence_index=3；en_pdf_pages=116-117；zh_pdf_pages=438-438；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 在生理上，脾为后天之本，气血生化之源；肾为先天之本，,藏精气。
en: Consequently, production of Qi-blood by the spleen depends on the warming-invigorating action of the kidneys.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=3.88；zh_sentence_index=3；en_sentence_index=4；en_pdf_pages=117-119；zh_pdf_pages=438-440；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 另外，脾的运化水液与肾的主水，两者相互配合，协同其他脏腑的功能，共同维持水液代谢的平衡。
en: In addition, aided by other Zang-Fu organs, the spleen and the kidneys coordinate their respective functions (in conveying fluid and dominating water) so as to maintain the balance in metabolism of body fluids.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=3.88；zh_sentence_index=7；en_sentence_index=8；en_pdf_pages=117-119；zh_pdf_pages=438-440；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 如先天不足，肾的温煦蒸腾作用虚弱，可影响脾的化生气血；后天失养，脾化生气血不足，则肾不能正常地“受五脏六腑之精而藏之”,可致肾中精气亏虚。
en: For example, congenital defect and weakness of the warming-invigorating action of the kidneys may impair the function of the spleen in generating Qi-blood, whereas lack of proper care after. birth and deficiency of Qi-blood produced by the spleen may lead to deficiency of the kidney-essence caused by failure of the kidneys to store the essence from other Zang-Fu-organs.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=3.88；zh_sentence_index=9；en_sentence_index=10；en_pdf_pages=117-119；zh_pdf_pages=438-440；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 从气的来源或气的生成来看，除与先天禀赋、后天饮食营养，以及自然环境等状况有关之外，均与肾、脾胃、肺的生理功能密切相关。
en: As regards the source or formation of Qi, it is closely related to the physiological functions of the kidneys, spleen, stomach and lungs in addition to innate andowment, acquired diet nutrition, and natural environment.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=4.2；zh_sentence_index=2；en_sentence_index=2；en_pdf_pages=119-120；zh_pdf_pages=440-440；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 气的防御作用，主要体现于护卫全身的肌表，防御外邪的入侵。
en: The defensive function of Qi is reflected mainly in protecting the body surface against external pathogens.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=4.5；zh_sentence_index=2；en_sentence_index=3；en_pdf_pages=120-121；zh_pdf_pages=441-441；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 如气、血、津液的生成，都需要将饮食物转化成水谷之精气，然后再化生成气、血、津液等；津液经过代谢，转化成汗液和尿液；饮食物经过消化和吸收后，其残渣转化成糟粕等，都是气化作用的具体表现。
en: For instance, the essence derived from the food and drink is transformed into Qi, blood and body fluids, the body fluids after being metabolized are converted into sweat and urine, and the residues of food after digestion and absorption are turned into feces, etc. All these processes are concrete manifestations of the transforming action of Qi.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=4.7；zh_sentence_index=3；en_sentence_index=2；en_pdf_pages=121-121；zh_pdf_pages=441-441；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 元气具存推动人体的生长和发育，温煦和激发各个脏腑、经络等组织器官的生理活动的作用。
en: The primordial Qi possesses the functions of promoting growth and development of the body, warming and activating all Zang-Fu organs, channels and collaterals and other structures.

en: As opposed to pathogens, the vital Qi is the healthy Qi of the body.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=4.13；zh_sentence_index=4；en_sentence_index=2；en_pdf_pages=124-124；zh_pdf_pages=443-443；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 营气和津液都源干水谷精气，所以饮食营养的优劣和脾胃运化的强弱、直接影响着血液的化生。
en: Since they both are derived from the food essence, the quality of the nutrients taken in and the functional state of the spleen and stomach directly influence the formation of blood.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=4.16；zh_sentence_index=2；en_sentence_index=2；en_pdf_pages=124-125；zh_pdf_pages=443-443；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 此外，精气可以化生血。
en: Moreover, the essence can also be transformed into blood.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=4.16；zh_sentence_index=3；en_sentence_index=3；en_pdf_pages=124-125；zh_pdf_pages=443-443；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 故《难经二十二难》说：“血主濡。
en: As is said inNan Jing:"The blood is responsible for nourishing the body".
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=4.17；zh_sentence_index=3；en_sentence_index=2；en_pdf_pages=125-125；zh_pdf_pages=444-444；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 此外，脉道是否通利，血的寒温情况，都与血的运行有着密切的关系。
en: In addition, unobstructed flow of Qi through the vessels and the temperature of blood are closely related to the circulation of blood.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=4.19；zh_sentence_index=3；en_sentence_index=5；en_pdf_pages=125-126；zh_pdf_pages=444-444；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 《素问经脉别论》说：“饮入于胃，游溢精气，上输于脾，脾气散精，上归于肺，通调水道，下输膀胱，水精四布，五经并行”。
en: A passage from the chapter Jing Mai Bie Lun in Suwen says:"The nutritious part of the drink taken is absorbed in the stomach, then transported upward into the lungs by the spleen, afterwards dispersed to the whole body and partly sent down to the urinary bladder by the action of the lungs in regulating water metabolism, and in so doing the body fluid can be extensively spread out and flow in all channels".
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=4.21；zh_sentence_index=1；en_sentence_index=1；en_pdf_pages=126-127；zh_pdf_pages=444-445；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 津液的输布和排泄，主要是通过脾的转输、肺的宣降和肾的蒸腾气化等脏腑功能的共同作用而完成的。
en: The distribution and excretion of the body fluid are accomplished by the joint action of many Zang-Fu organs, chiefly the transportation of the spleen, dispersion and descent of the lungs, and warming-steaming and lifting clear-lowering turbid of the kidneys.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=4.21；zh_sentence_index=3；en_sentence_index=3；en_pdf_pages=126-127；zh_pdf_pages=444-445；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 津液的输布与排泄，又以三焦为通道。
en: The body fluid takes the Tri-Jiao as its passageway for distribution and excretion.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=4.21；zh_sentence_index=4；en_sentence_index=4；en_pdf_pages=126-127；zh_pdf_pages=444-445；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 气能摄血，是指血在脉中循行而不逸出脉外，主要依赖气对血的固摄作用。
en: And lastly by the control of blood circulation is meant that the flow of blood within the vessels instead of extravasating depends mainly upon the dominant action of Qi.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=4.23；zh_sentence_index=4；en_sentence_index=3；en_pdf_pages=127-128；zh_pdf_pages=445-445；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 故称“血为气之母”。
en: Thus blood is said to be "the mother of Qi".
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=4.24；zh_sentence_index=2；en_sentence_index=3；en_pdf_pages=128-128；zh_pdf_pages=445-445；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 经脉有一定的循行径路，而络脉则纵横交错，网络全身，把人体所有的脏腑、器官、孔窍以及皮肉筋骨等组织联结成一个统一的有机整体。
en: The channels take a definite route, but the collaterals are widely distributed throughout the body like an interlacing network which combines all such structures of the body as the Zang-Fu organs, body orifices, skin, muscles, tendons and bones, into an integral whole.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=5.2；zh_sentence_index=4；en_sentence_index=5；en_pdf_pages=129-129；zh_pdf_pages=447-447；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 别络具有加强相为表里两条经脉之间在体表的联系。

note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=5.3；zh_sentence_index=10；en_sentence_index=11；en_pdf_pages=130-131；zh_pdf_pages=447-448；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 浮络是循于人体浅表部位而常浮现的络脉。
en: And the minute collaterals refer to all the tiny collaterals.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=5.3；zh_sentence_index=11；en_sentence_index=12；en_pdf_pages=130-131；zh_pdf_pages=447-448；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 其脉起于脉中，与女子妊娠有关，故有“任主胞胎”之说。
en: As the saying goes:"The Ren channel is responsible for the supply to fetus in the uterus".
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=5.11；zh_sentence_index=4；en_sentence_index=4；en_pdf_pages=135-135；zh_pdf_pages=450-450；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 从别络分出的细小络脉称为“孙络”,即《灵枢腹度》所谓“络之别者为孙”。
en: The tiny collaterals branching off from the big ones are named"minute collaterals". As is described in the chapter Mai Du of Lingshu,"The little branches of the collaterals" are called minute collaterals.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=5.18；zh_sentence_index=1；en_sentence_index=1；en_pdf_pages=137-137；zh_pdf_pages=451-451；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 如六淫、疠气、七情内伤、饮食不节、劳逸失度、各种外伤，以及痰饮、瘀血等病理产物，都可导致疾病的发生，因而都属致病因素。
en: For instance, a disease can be caused by such pathological products as six climate conditions in excess (wind, cold, summer-heat, dampness, dryness and fire), epidemic pathogenic factors, impairment due to seven emotions (joy, anger, melancholy, anxiety, grief, fear and terror).improper diet, overwork, various kinds of traumatic injuries, phlegm retention and blood stasis, all of which, therefore, constitute pathogenic factors.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=6.3；zh_sentence_index=3；en_sentence_index=3；en_pdf_pages=140-141；zh_pdf_pages=453-454；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 风气太过，伤人致病，即称为风邪。
en: Wind in excess, called wind pathogen, can cause disease.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=6.7；zh_sentence_index=2；en_sentence_index=2；en_pdf_pages=143-144；zh_pdf_pages=455-455；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 暑热太过，伤人致病，则为暑邪。
en: Summer-heat in excess, causing disease, is known as pathogenic summer-heat.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=6.9；zh_sentence_index=2；en_sentence_index=2；en_pdf_pages=145-146；zh_pdf_pages=456-456；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 湿邪的这一致病特点，一是指湿病症状多粘滞不爽，如大便粘腻不爽、小便滞涩不畅、舌苔粘腻等；二是指湿邪为病多缠绵难愈、病程较长或反复发作，如湿疹、湿痹等。
en: This feature of damp disease refers to; a) damp syndrome marked by stickiness such as slimy and greasy stool and urine, greasy fur of the tongue, etc; b) a lingering disease difficult to cure, characterized by longer duration of illness or repeated attack, as often seen in eczema, damp arthralgia, etc.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=6.10；zh_sentence_index=14；en_sentence_index=13；en_pdf_pages=146-147；zh_pdf_pages=456-457；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 燥邪的致病特点是：(1)燥性于涩、易伤津液。
en: It possesses the following features:(1) Pathogenic dryness, being dry in nature, is liable to impair body fluid.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=6.11；zh_sentence_index=2；en_sentence_index=3；en_pdf_pages=147-148；zh_pdf_pages=457-457；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 但热多属外淫，而火常自内生。
en: However, heat is an exogenic pathogenic factor while fire an endogenic one.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=6.12；zh_sentence_index=2；en_sentence_index=2；en_pdf_pages=148-149；zh_pdf_pages=457-458；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 津液外泄，气亦随之而耗，且火邪又易伤人正气、故常使全身机能衰退，疲惫不堪。
en: The outflow of body fluid also results in consumption of Qi. Moreover, fire-pathogen tends to impair vital Qi, thus leading to general hypofunction and overfatigue.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=6.12；zh_sentence_index=8；en_sentence_index=8；en_pdf_pages=148-149；zh_pdf_pages=457-458；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: (4)易致肿疡。火邪结于局部，易使气血壅滞，火盛则腐肉败血，而成痈肿疮疡，表现为局部红肿热痛，甚至化脓溃烂。
en: Accumulated in a local spot, fire-pathogen is apt to bring about the stagnation of Qi and blood. Meanwhile, excessive fire will damage muscles and blood, thus resulting in large carbuncles and painful swelling on the body surface marked by localized swelling and burning pain in the wound or even suppuration and ulceration in it.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=6.12；zh_sentence_index=12；en_sentence_index=12；en_pdf_pages=148-149；zh_pdf_pages=457-458；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 且气血不足则正气虚弱，抵抗力降低，也易继发其它疾病。
en: Furthermore, insufficiency of Qi and blood gives rise to deficiency of vital Qi and lowered body resistance, easily followed by other disorders.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=6.17；zh_sentence_index=3；en_sentence_index=3；en_pdf_pages=152-153；zh_pdf_pages=459-459；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 劳神过度、是指思虑太过，劳伤心脾而言。
en: By undue mental work are meant excessive meditation and anxiety which impair the heart and spleen.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=6.18；zh_sentence_index=7；en_sentence_index=4；en_pdf_pages=153-154；zh_pdf_pages=459-460；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 长期不活动、易使大体气血不勿，牌胃功能减弱，可出现食少乏力，精神不振，肢体软弱，或发胖壅肿，动则心悸、气喘、汗出等。
en: Long-term divorce from physical activities tends to cause retardation of circulation of Qi and blood and hypofunction of the spleen and stomach manifested by anorexia, acratia, lassitude and weakness of the limbs, obesity or palpitation, shortness.of breath and sweating on slight exertion.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=6.18；zh_sentence_index=11；en_sentence_index=7；en_pdf_pages=153-154；zh_pdf_pages=459-460；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 枪惮、企刃、跌打损伤、持重努伤等外伤，可引起皮肤肌肉瘀血肿痛、出血、或筋伤骨折脱臼。
en: Such traumatic injuries as gunshot injuries, incised wounds, contusions, sprains and others may lead to blood stasis and painful swelling on the skin and muscles, bleeding or laceration of muscles and tendons, fracture and dislocation.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=6.19；zh_sentence_index=2；en_sentence_index=2；en_pdf_pages=154-155；zh_pdf_pages=460-460；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 烧烫伤，多由高温物品、沸水，或滚热汕液，或火焰等烧烫后引起。
en: Burns and scalds are usually caused by high temperature objects, boiling water, scorching oil or fire, etc.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=6.19；zh_sentence_index=4；en_sentence_index=4；en_pdf_pages=154-155；zh_pdf_pages=460-460；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 轻者损伤皮肤，出现红，肿、热、痛，重度烧伤，创面过大，常因剧烈疼痛，火毒内攻，体液蒸发或渗出、出现烦躁不安、发热、口渴、尿少等症，甚至死亡。
en: Slight burns and scalds only injure the skin, manifested as redness, swelling, fever or pain in the affected area while severe ones, if the surface of the wound is too large, are complicated by such symptoms as dysphoria, fever, thirst or oliguria or even death due to severe pain in the wound, internal invasion by fire-toxin, and evaporation or exudation of body fluid.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=6.19；zh_sentence_index=5；en_sentence_index=5；en_pdf_pages=154-155；zh_pdf_pages=460-460；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 因其形成后，又能直接或间接地作用于机体的某些部位，引起脏腑组织新的病理改变，形成各种不同的证候，故将其称为致病因素。
en: It is also referred to as a pathogenic factor because after its formation it may act directly or indirectly upon certain parts of the body, producing some new pathological changes in Zang-Fu organs and tissues manifested by various symptoms and signs.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=6.20；zh_sentence_index=2；en_sentence_index=2；en_pdf_pages=155-156；zh_pdf_pages=461-461；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 脾、肺、肾、三焦与水液的运行敷布排泄关系密切。
en: These organs and tri-Jiao are closely related to circulation, distribution and excretion of water and fluid.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=6.21；zh_sentence_index=2；en_sentence_index=2；en_pdf_pages=156-156；zh_pdf_pages=461-461；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 痰饮的致病特点可归纳为以下几点：(1)阻碍经脉气血的运行。
en: Its pathogenic characteristics are summarized as follows:(1) It obstructs the circulation of Qi and blood in the channels and vessels.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=6.22；zh_sentence_index=2；en_sentence_index=3；en_pdf_pages=157-158；zh_pdf_pages=461-462；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 痰饮流注于经络中，可阻碍气血运行，使气血郁滞不畅，出现肢体麻木，半身不遂等。
en: The retention of phlegm in the channels may block the circulation of Qi and blood, thus causing numbness of limbs, hemiplegia, etc. due to stagnation of Qi and blood.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=6.22；zh_sentence_index=3；en_sentence_index=4；en_pdf_pages=157-158；zh_pdf_pages=461-462；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 痰饮流注于脏腑组织中，可阻碍气机升降出入，变生它病。
en: Flowing into the Zang-Fu organs, phlegm may disturb the ascending or descending and entering or exiting functions of Qi, thus giving rise to other diseases.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=6.22；zh_sentence_index=6；en_sentence_index=6；en_pdf_pages=157-158；zh_pdf_pages=461-462；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 气能行水，气滞则水停，故可进一步加重水液代谢的失常。
en: Since Qi promotes the circulation of water, stagnation of Qi leads to retention of water in the body.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=6.22；zh_sentence_index=10；en_sentence_index=10；en_pdf_pages=157-158；zh_pdf_pages=461-462；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 包括离经之血积存于体内，及血运不畅、阻滞于经脉及脏腑内的血液。
en: It refers to the extravasated blood accumulated within the body and the blood stagnated in channels and vessels and Zang-Fu organs due to impeded blood circulation.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=6.23；zh_sentence_index=2；en_sentence_index=2；en_pdf_pages=158-158；zh_pdf_pages=462-462；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: (3)出血，血色紫暗，或挟有瘀块。
en: Escaping blood, dark purplish in color, is mixed with clots.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=6.25；zh_sentence_index=5；en_sentence_index=5；en_pdf_pages=159-160；zh_pdf_pages=462-463；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 瘀血阻滞，可导致多种出血症，如呕血、略血、便血、尿血、皮肤紫斑、妇女月经过多、崩漏等。
en: Retention of extravasated blood may present many hemorrhagic symptoms such as hematemesis, hemoptysis bloody stool and urine, purpura on the skin, menorrhagia, metrorrhagia, etc.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=6.25；zh_sentence_index=6；en_sentence_index=6；en_pdf_pages=159-160；zh_pdf_pages=462-463；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 因此疾病的发生，关系到正气与邪气两个方面。
en: Therefore, the onset of a disease iinvolves two aspects: vital Qi on the one hand and pathogens on the other.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=6.28；zh_sentence_index=2；en_sentence_index=2；en_pdf_pages=161-161；zh_pdf_pages=463-463；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 正气不足是疾病发生的内在根据。
en: Insufficiency of vital Qiis the intrinsic factor in the onset of a disease.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=6.28；zh_sentence_index=3；en_sentence_index=3；en_pdf_pages=161-161；zh_pdf_pages=463-463；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 人体正气充盛，邪气就难以侵入，人体也不会发病。
en: When vitalQi is sufficient, it is difficult for the pathogens to invade the body and no disease occurs.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=6.28；zh_sentence_index=4；en_sentence_index=4；en_pdf_pages=161-161；zh_pdf_pages=463-463；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 如疠气，外伤等，均不以人体正气的强弱为主要依据，在发病中常起主导作用。
en: For example, epidemic pathogenic factor, traumatic injury and others often play a leading role in the causation of disease independent of the condition of vital Qi.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=6.29；zh_sentence_index=4；en_sentence_index=5；en_pdf_pages=161-162；zh_pdf_pages=464-464；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 发病以后，由于正气强弱的差异、病邪性质的不同和感邪的轻重，以及邪在部位的浅深，从而引起各种不同的病证。
en: When the disease occurs, it will manifest itself by different syndromes, depending on the disease-resisting power of vital Qi, virulence of pathogens, and severity of the disease as well as depth of the part affected.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=6.31；zh_sentence_index=2；en_sentence_index=2；en_pdf_pages=162-163；zh_pdf_pages=464-464；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 正气强，尚能抗邪，邪正斗争剧烈，多表现为实证；正气不足，抗邪无力，多表现为虚证或虚实夹杂证。
en: For instance, an excess syndrome is present when vital Qi is powerful enough to destroy pathogens in desperate struggle against them while a deficiency syndrome occurs when vital Qi is insufficient or too weak to resist pathogens.

entities.en: combination of deficiency and excess syndromes

note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=6.31；zh_sentence_index=3；en_sentence_index=3；en_pdf_pages=162-163；zh_pdf_pages=464-464；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 内环境，主要指人体本身的正气。
en: By internal environment is mainly meant vital Qi of the body proper.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=6.32；zh_sentence_index=5；en_sentence_index=5；en_pdf_pages=163-165；zh_pdf_pages=464-466；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 同时或引起脏腑、经络功能失调，或使气血功能紊乱，从而导致全身或局部的多种多样的病理变化，出现千变万化的临床征象。
en: Meanwhile, the resultant dysfunction of the Zang-Fu organs and channels and collaterals or derangement of Qi and blood can, in turn, bring about a variety of general or local pathological changes, manifested by everchanging clinical symptoms.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.1；zh_sentence_index=5；en_sentence_index=4；en_pdf_pages=165-165；zh_pdf_pages=466-466；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 但气与血又是脏功能活动的产物，因而脏腑发生病变，必然影响气血，从而引起气或血的病理变化。
en: On the other hand, Qi and blood are the products of the fucntional activities of Zang-Fu organs, and, therefore, any pathological change they undergo will certainly influence Qi and blood, thus giving rise to pathological changes of Qi and blood.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.24；zh_sentence_index=2；en_sentence_index=4；en_pdf_pages=181-181；zh_pdf_pages=474-474；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 气虚则其各种功能减退，故临床常见精神萎顿，倦怠无力，自汗，易感冒等病理变化。
en: Deficiency of Qi, leading to hypofunction of various organs, is manifested by such symptons as listlessness, lassitude, spontaneous sweating, and susceptibility to cold.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.25；zh_sentence_index=4；en_sentence_index=4；en_pdf_pages=181-182；zh_pdf_pages=474-474；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 由于气与血、津液的关系极为密切，气虚必然会影响血和津液的生成、运行、敷布，从而引起血和津液的多种病变。
en: Since Qi bears a close relationship with blood and body fluid, deficiency of Qi is bound to affect the generation, transportation and distribution of blood and body fluid, thereby giving rise to many pathological changes of blood and body fluid.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.25；zh_sentence_index=5；en_sentence_index=5；en_pdf_pages=181-182；zh_pdf_pages=474-474；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 气行则血行、津布，气滞则血瘀、水停，形成瘀血、痰饮等病理产物。
en: Stagnated Qi, however, will make blood and water stop flowing, thereby producing such morbid products as blood stasis and phlegm retention.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.27；zh_sentence_index=4；en_sentence_index=4；en_pdf_pages=183-183；zh_pdf_pages=475-475；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 因此，瘀血、痰饮与气滞在病变过程中常互为因果。
en: Therefore, blood stasis, phlegm and stagnation of Qi turn out to be the cause and effect of each other in turn.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.27；zh_sentence_index=5；en_sentence_index=5；en_pdf_pages=183-183；zh_pdf_pages=475-475；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 由于肝升肺降、脾升胃降在调节全身气机中起着极为重要的作用，因此，肝、肺、脾、胃等脏腑功能障碍，常形成气滞，而气滞也常见于肺气壅滞、肝郁气滞或脾胃气滞。
en: Since the liver (responsible for ascending function), the lungs (for descending function), the spleen (for ascending function) and the stomach (for descending function) all play an extremely important role in the regulation of functional activities of the human body, dysfunction of these organs often causes the stangnation of Qi, as is often seen in obstruction of the lung-Qi, and stangation of the liver-Qi, of the spleen and stomach-Qi.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.27；zh_sentence_index=8；en_sentence_index=7；en_pdf_pages=183-183；zh_pdf_pages=475-475；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 由于肝为刚脏，主动主升，又为藏血之脏，因此肝升泄太过，肝气上逆时，甚可导致血随气逆，或为咯血、呕血，或壅遏清窍而致昏厥。
en: The liver, an energetic Zang-organ, maintains potency for the flow of Qi and storage of blood, therefore.upward invasion of the hyperactive liver-Qi leads to hemoptysis and haematesis due to the reversed flow of Qi, or even to syncope due to disturbance of Qi in the brain.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.28；zh_sentence_index=7；en_sentence_index=4；en_pdf_pages=183-184；zh_pdf_pages=475-475；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 因脾主升，又为气血生化之源，故在脾虚时，更易导致气陷，故气陷常称为脾气下陷，或中气(即脾胃之气的合称)下陷。
en: Because the spleen, as the source of growth and development of Qi and blood, performs the function of sending up essential nutrients, its insufficiency is more likely to cause Qi collapse, commonly known as collapse of the spleen-Qi or sinking of Qi of the middie-Jiao{a general term for the spleen and the stomach).
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.29；zh_sentence_index=4；en_sentence_index=3；en_pdf_pages=184-185；zh_pdf_pages=476-476；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 由于气陷是因虚而陷，故在临床上除见有某些内脏下垂外，常伴有腰腹胀满重坠，便意频频，以及气短乏力，语声低微，脉弱无力等气虚征象。
en: Qi-collapse brought about by deficiency syndrome, is usually manifested by some symptoms of deficiency type, such as abdominal distention with tenesmus, frequent feeling of stool, shortness of breath, listlessness, weak voice, weak pulse, etc. in addition to ptoses of some of the Zang-organs.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.29；zh_sentence_index=5；en_sentence_index=4；en_pdf_pages=184-185；zh_pdf_pages=476-476；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 多由于正不敌邪，或正气持续衰弱，以致气不内守而外脱，或因大出血、大汗等气随血脱或气随津脱而致气脱。
en: The external exbaustion of Qi due to its inability to stay internally reuslts from failure of vital Qi to ward off pathogens or from prolonged weakening of vital Qi or from exhaustion of Qi caused by massive bleeding or profuse sweat, etc.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.31；zh_sentence_index=2；en_sentence_index=2；en_pdf_pages=185-186；zh_pdf_pages=476-476；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 气脱实际上是各种虚脱病变的主要病机。
en: Actually, exhaustion of Qi is the leading pathogenesis of various prostration syndromes.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.31；zh_sentence_index=4；en_sentence_index=4；en_pdf_pages=185-186；zh_pdf_pages=476-476；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 如脾胃虚弱，饮食营养不足，血液生化无源，致血的生成不足，而大失血，或慢性病营血暗耗，则致血的耗伤太过，形成血虚。
en: For instance, weakness of the spleen and stomach, malnutrition and no substance from which blood is generated result in inadequate formation of blood; while the resultant massive hemorrhage or slow and unconscious consumption of nutritive Qi and blood due to chronic illness brings about excessive consumption of blood, thereby leading to deficiency of blood.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.32；zh_sentence_index=3；en_sentence_index=3；en_pdf_pages=186-186；zh_pdf_pages=476-477；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 全身各脏腑经络组织器官，都依赖于血的濡养，故血虚可导致全身或局部的失荣失养，功能活动逐渐减退等虚弱证候。
en: Since the Zang-Fu organs and tissues, channels and collaterals depend on blood for their nourishment, deficiency of blood may lead to such weak syndromes of deficiency type as general or localized malnutrition, gradual decline of functinal activities, etc.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.32；zh_sentence_index=4；en_sentence_index=4；en_pdf_pages=186-186；zh_pdf_pages=476-477；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 导致血瘀的原因主要有气滞、气虚、血寒、血热以及痰浊内阻等。
en: It is due chiefly to stagnation of Qi, deficiency of Qi, blood-cold, blood-heat and retention of phlegm in the interior as well.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.33；zh_sentence_index=2；en_sentence_index=2；en_pdf_pages=186-187；zh_pdf_pages=477-477；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 瘀血是血瘀的病理产物，而瘀血形成后，又可阻于脉络，成为形成血瘀的一种原因。
en: Since stagnant blood is the pathological product of blood stasis, it may be obstructed in channels and collaterals after its formation, thus serving as one of the causes of blood stasis.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.33；zh_sentence_index=8；en_sentence_index=5；en_pdf_pages=186-187；zh_pdf_pages=477-477；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 血热多由于邪热入血所致，也可由情志郁结，五志化火引起。
en: It is caused by attack of blood by heat pathognes and by fire pathogen transfomed by emotionai disorders due to mental depression.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.34；zh_sentence_index=2；en_sentence_index=2；en_pdf_pages=187-188；zh_pdf_pages=477-477；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 血分有热，热迫血行，可致血行加速，甚则灼伤脉络，迫血妄行，而致各种出血。
en: Heat in the blood system and forced flow of blood by heat may speed up the flow of blood and burn channels and vessels. resulting in various kinds of bleeding due to blood-heat.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.34；zh_sentence_index=3；en_sentence_index=3；en_pdf_pages=187-188；zh_pdf_pages=477-477；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 同时，邪热入血，又可煎熬血和津液。
en: Meanwhile, invasion of blood by heat pathogens decocts blood and body fluid.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.34；zh_sentence_index=4；en_sentence_index=4；en_pdf_pages=187-188；zh_pdf_pages=477-477；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 津液正常的生成、输布与排泄、离不开气的升降出入运动和气化功能，亦离不开脾的运化，肺的宣降，肾的蒸腾气化及三焦水道的通调。
en: Normal production, distribution and excrection of body fluid are inseparable from ascending or descending and incoming or outgoing movements of Qi and its functional activities, transporting and transforming function of the spleen, dispersing und descending function of the lungs, water-regulating function of the kidneys and clearance and regulation of water passage by tri-Jiao.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.40；zh_sentence_index=3；en_sentence_index=3；en_pdf_pages=190-191；zh_pdf_pages=479-479；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 若气的升降出入运动失去平衡协调，气化功能失常，或脾、肺、肾及三焦的功能失常，均能导致津液的代谢失常，从而形成津液不足，或停留体内而生痰饮水湿等病理变化。
en: Disharmony and imbalance of the movement of Qi. or functional disturbance of Qi, the spleen, lungs, kidneys or tri-Jiao all may give rise to disturbance in fluid metabolism, thus producing such pathological changes as insufficiency of body fluid or retention of phlegm and accumulation of dampness.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.40；zh_sentence_index=4；en_sentence_index=4；en_pdf_pages=190-191；zh_pdf_pages=479-479；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 多由燥热之邪或五志之火灼伤律液，或多汗、吐海、失血、或过用辛燥之剂等引起津液耗伤所致。
en: Insufficiency of body fluid is mostly attributable to consumption of body fluid by pathogenic dryness-heat and disorders of five emotions, or profuse perspiration, vomiting, diarrhea, loss of blood or excessive intake of drugs of acrid taste and drying effect. etc.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.41；zh_sentence_index=2；en_sentence_index=2；en_pdf_pages=191-192；zh_pdf_pages=479-479；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 津液的输布障碍，是指津液得不到正常的输布，导致津液在体内环流迟缓，或在体内某一局部发生滞留，因而水湿内生，酿痰成饮。
en: By disturbance in distribution of body fluid is meant that it cannot be normally distributed, leading to sluggish circulation and local accumulation of dampness, which is transformed into phlegm retention.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.42；zh_sentence_index=3；en_sentence_index=2；en_pdf_pages=192-193；zh_pdf_pages=480-480；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 但由于汗液排泄障碍时，津液代谢后的废液仍可化为尿排出体外，故说肾主宰着津液的排泄。
en: Owing to the fact that in case of disturbance in sweat discharge, waste fluid left after metabolism still can be transformed into urine to be discharged from the body, the kidneys are said to govern the excretion of body fluid.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.42；zh_sentence_index=10；en_sentence_index=5；en_pdf_pages=192-193；zh_pdf_pages=480-480；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 肾的功能失常，尿液的生成与排泄障碍、必致水湿潴留泛滥而为水肿。
en: To sum up functional disturbance of the kidneys and disturbance in formation and discharge of urine will eventually lead to water retention thus forming edema.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.42；zh_sentence_index=11；en_sentence_index=6；en_pdf_pages=192-193；zh_pdf_pages=480-480；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 津液与血同为气的载体，津液大量耗伤丢失，气无所依附，亦随之外脱。
en: As body fluid and blood are the carrier of Qi, loss of body fluid will deprive Qi of its lodgement and Qiwillbe exhausted externall as well.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.44；zh_sentence_index=3；en_sentence_index=2；en_pdf_pages=193-194；zh_pdf_pages=480-481；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 因津血同源互渗，各种原因如高热、烧伤、吐泻、大汗出等导致津亏，则不能充盈血脉，而致血容量减少，血液循行滞涩不畅，引致血瘀之病变。
en: As body fluid and blood, derived from the same source, are mutually permeable, loss of body fluid because of nigh fever, burns, vomiting, diarrhea, profuse perspiration, etc., will cause hypovolemia and sluggish circulation of blood, leading to blood stasis.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.46；zh_sentence_index=2；en_sentence_index=2；en_pdf_pages=194-195；zh_pdf_pages=481-481；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 临床上除有津液不足的表现外，可兼见舌质紫绛，或有瘀点、瘀斑，或见斑疹显露等血瘀征象。
en: In addition to clinical manifestations, such as insufficiency of body fluid, there are such symptoms of blood stasis as purplish tongue, or petechia ecchymosis, or skin eruption.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.46；zh_sentence_index=3；en_sentence_index=3；en_pdf_pages=194-195；zh_pdf_pages=481-481；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 脾主运化水湿，脾的运化失职是湿浊内生的关键，故又称之为脾虚生湿。
en: As the spleen has the function to transport and transform water, dysfunction of the spleen in transport is a leading cause of production of turbid dampness in the interior.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.55；zh_sentence_index=2；en_sentence_index=2；en_pdf_pages=198-198；zh_pdf_pages=483-483；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 常见如肝气郁结、气郁化火，发为肝火。
en: For instance, stagnation of liver-Qi gives rise to liver-fire.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.57；zh_sentence_index=11；en_sentence_index=10；en_pdf_pages=199-200；zh_pdf_pages=484-484；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 因此，脏腑病机在病机理论中占有极其重要的地位、是辩证论治的主要理论根据。
en: Therefore, pathogenesis of Zang-Fu organs occupies an important place in the theory of pathogenesis, and forms the foundation of"treatment based on differential diagnosis".
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.58；zh_sentence_index=3；en_sentence_index=3；en_pdf_pages=200-201；zh_pdf_pages=484-485；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 虚火内迫血脉，可见舌质红，脉细数。
en: When fire of deficiency type attacks the blood vessels, there will be such symptoms as red tongue and small rapid pulse.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.61；zh_sentence_index=4；en_sentence_index=4；en_pdf_pages=203-203；zh_pdf_pages=486-486；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 甚则气血凝滞而不通，则可见心悸怔忡、心前区暴痛、重者肢冷、脉伏不出、汗出而脱厥。
en: In severe cases. there may appear stagnation and blockage of Qi and blood, manifested by severe palpitation, sudden attack of pain in the precordium, even cold limbs in severe cases, deep-seated pulse, and syncope after profuse sweating.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.63；zh_sentence_index=4；en_sentence_index=5；en_pdf_pages=204-204；zh_pdf_pages=486-486；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 但肺失宣发与肺失肃降在病理过程中常相互影响，因而均可导致肺气上逆而见咳喘，或致水道不能通调而致水肿、尿少。
en: However, weakened dispersing function and impairment of purifying and descending function of the lungs may influence each other in the pathologic process, either of which may cause abnormal rising of the lung-Qi, giving rise to cough and dyspnea, or disturbance in water metabolism manifested by edema and oliguria.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.65；zh_sentence_index=7；en_sentence_index=6；en_pdf_pages=205-206；zh_pdf_pages=487-487；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 肾失封藏，则肾精易于流失，可见遗精、滑泄，影响纳气功能，可见气浮于上，动则气喘。
en: Due to dysfunction of the kidneys, the kidnely-essence is easily lost, thus leading to seminal emission and spermatorrhea.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.76；zh_sentence_index=3；en_sentence_index=3；en_pdf_pages=211-211；zh_pdf_pages=490-490；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 寒客胃腑、气机郁滞、络脉收引，故常出现较剧烈的脘痛，痛得温而减的病理表现。
en: The stomach-cold leads to sluggish functional activities of Qi and contraction of meridians, often marked by severe epigastric pain which is relieved by warmth.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.81；zh_sentence_index=2；en_sentence_index=2；en_pdf_pages=213-214；zh_pdf_pages=491-491；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 多由邪热客胃，或由嗜酒、嗜食辛辣，过食膏粱厚味，助火生热，或由气滞、瘀血、痰湿，食积等郁而化热，火热蕴积胃腑而致。
en: It is mainly due to attack of the stomach by pathogenic heat; or to indulgence in alcoholic drinks, preference for hot, pungent food, excessive intake of food rich in fat, which produces heat; or to accumulation of heat in the stomach which is transformed from stagnated Qi, blood stasis, and retention of phlegm or food.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.82；zh_sentence_index=1；en_sentence_index=1；en_pdf_pages=214-215；zh_pdf_pages=491-492；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 胃热，则其腐熟水谷的功能过于亢进，可出现胃中嘈杂，消谷善饥等病理表现。
en: The stomach heat gives rise to hyperfunction of the stomach, marked by unpleasant hungry sensation, excessive appetite, etc.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.82；zh_sentence_index=2；en_sentence_index=2；en_pdf_pages=214-215；zh_pdf_pages=491-492；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 胃热化火上炎，可导致胃气上逆、而见恶心、呕吐酸苦黄水。
en: When the fire transformed from the stomach-heat flares up, it leads to adverse rising of the stomach-Qi, marked bly nausea and acid regurgitation.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.82；zh_sentence_index=4；en_sentence_index=4；en_pdf_pages=214-215；zh_pdf_pages=491-492；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 火热灼伤胃之脉络，则血上溢而呕血。
en: Furthermore when the fire impairs the vessels of the stomach, the blood flows upward to produce hematemesis.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.82；zh_sentence_index=6；en_sentence_index=6；en_pdf_pages=214-215；zh_pdf_pages=491-492；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 中医学的诊病方法，就是通过四诊，了解疾病表现在外的各种症状和体征，从而推断疾病的病因、病机，为辨证论治提供依据。
en: The diagnostic method aims at collecting various symptoms and signs manifested by a disease by means of the four diagnostic techniques and then at finding out its cause and pathogenesis, thereby providing a basis for selection of treatment.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.1；zh_sentence_index=3；en_sentence_index=3；en_pdf_pages=215-215；zh_pdf_pages=492-492；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 凡一切可见的有关疾病的征象都属望诊的内容。
en: All visible signs related to the disease are within the scope of inspection.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.2；zh_sentence_index=2；en_sentence_index=2；en_pdf_pages=215-216；zh_pdf_pages=492-492；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 稀疏松浮者病浅，稠密紧束者病深，疹点疏密不匀，或出而即陷者，多为正气不足，邪气内陷的危候。
en: In addition rashes uneven in density or quickly disappearing are generally regarded as the critical symptom due to insufficiency of vital Qi and invasion of the interior of the body by pathogens.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.22；zh_sentence_index=5；en_sentence_index=4；en_pdf_pages=227-227；zh_pdf_pages=498-498；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 望舌，包括望舌体和舌苔，舌体是舌的肌肉、络脉组织，舌苔是舌体上附着的一层苔状物，由胃气熏蒸而成。
en: Observation of the tongue includes inspection of the tongue proper, which consists of muscles, vessels, etc and that of the tongue fur, a layer of fur-like substance covering the surface of the tongue and formed by steaming of the stomach-Qi.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.24；zh_sentence_index=2；en_sentence_index=3；en_pdf_pages=228-229；zh_pdf_pages=499-499；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 边有齿痕，淡白而湿润者、多属寒湿壅盛；淡红而边有齿痕者，又多属脾虚或气虚。
en: For instance the pale and moist tongue with tooth prints at its borders usually suggests an excess of cold-dampness whereas the pink tongue with tooth marks on its margin, hypofunction of the spleen or insufficiency of Qi.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.33；zh_sentence_index=3；en_sentence_index=4；en_pdf_pages=233-233；zh_pdf_pages=501-501；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 其中舌紫红势急者，多为肝风发痉；舌淡红势缓者，多为中风偏枯。
en: Pathologically, the purplish-red and wry tongue, associated with acute symptoms, most probably suggests convulsions due to intense liver-wind, while the reddish and wry tongue, accompanied by chronic symptoms, usually indicates hemiplegia due to apoplexy.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.38；zh_sentence_index=5；en_sentence_index=4；en_pdf_pages=236-236；zh_pdf_pages=502-502；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 黄的程度与热的程度有关，黄色越深，邪热越重。
en: The deeper the yellow of the tongue fur, the more intense the pathogenic heat.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.41；zh_sentence_index=2；en_sentence_index=2；en_pdf_pages=237-238；zh_pdf_pages=503-503；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 望排出物、主要是审察其形、色、量、质的变化、以了解脏腑的病变。
en: Observation of discharges aims chiefly at examining their changes in appearance, colour, amount and nature, so as to find out pathological changes of the Zang-Fu organs.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.48；zh_sentence_index=4；en_sentence_index=4；en_pdf_pages=242-242；zh_pdf_pages=505-505；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 纹色鲜红，多属外感风寒；纹色紫红，多为热证；纹色青，多主风证或痛证；纹色青紫或紫黑，是为血络郁闭，属病危之象；纹色淡白，多为脾虚。
en: For instance, bright-red venules usually indicate attack of exogenous pathogens such as wind and cold; purplish-red venules, heat-syndrome; bluish venules, windsyndrome or pain-syndrome; bluish-purple, or purplish-black venules denote a critical stage due to blockade of superficial venules, and pale venules, deficiency of the spleen.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.54；zh_sentence_index=2；en_sentence_index=2；en_pdf_pages=246-246；zh_pdf_pages=507-507；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 肺主气、肾纳气，语言受制手心神，故声音与肺、肾，心关系最为密切。
en: Since the lungs control the Qi of the body, the kidneys regulate inspiration and the heart governs speech, the voice is most closely related to the organs mentioned above.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.58；zh_sentence_index=2；en_sentence_index=2；en_pdf_pages=248-248；zh_pdf_pages=508-508；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 喘有虚实之分，息粗音高，惟以呼出为快者，属实；气怯声低，气不得续者为虚；呼吸急促似喘，伴喉中哮鸣音者为哮；呼吸较常人急而短促，息快不相接续，似喘而不抬肩，虽急并无痰声者，叫短气；胸中郁闷不舒，时时发出长吁短叹之声的为叹息，是肝气郁结所致。
en: Paroxymal rapid respiration with wheezing is named asthma; breathing shorter and quicker than that of normal people, with difficulty in going on respiration like dyspnea but without elevated shoulder, and with rapid breath but without wheezing, is called shortness of breath, oppressive and stuffy sensation in the chest with frequent moaning and groaning is named sigh due to stagnation of the liver-Qi.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.60；zh_sentence_index=3；en_sentence_index=4；en_pdf_pages=249-249；zh_pdf_pages=508-509；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 小便黄赤短臭，多是湿热、病室有尿臊味，多见手水肿晚期患者；口出烂苹果味，是为消渴。
en: Scanty, foul and dark yellow urine frequently indicates damp-heat syndrome and urine smell in the ward is often seen in the late stage of serious edema. Lastly, foul smell like the odour of rotten apple from the mouth is attributable to diabetes.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.62；zh_sentence_index=4；en_sentence_index=5；en_pdf_pages=250-251；zh_pdf_pages=509-509；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 问诊时，医生态度应当和蔼，注意不要暗示，更切忌刺激病人。
en: When questioning, a doctor must be amiable without dropping any hint and avoid upseting the patient.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.63；zh_sentence_index=4；en_sentence_index=4；en_pdf_pages=251-251；zh_pdf_pages=509-510；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 外邪所致的寒热多并见，内伤之寒热多独见。
en: Cold and heat due to exogenous pathogens often occur simultaneously, while either due to internal injury appears separately.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.64；zh_sentence_index=4；en_sentence_index=4；en_pdf_pages=251-252；zh_pdf_pages=510-510；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 病邪的性质和正气亏损的程度不同，汗出异常的表现亦不相同，所以通过问汗，可以分辨疾病的表里寒热虚实。
en: Since abnormal perspirations vary with the nature of pathogens and degree of deficiency of vital Qi, questioning about perspiration may help the doctor to differentiate the varied morbid states, such as asthenic or sthenic syndrome, superficial orinterior syndrome and cold or heat syndrome.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.69；zh_sentence_index=4；en_sentence_index=2；en_pdf_pages=254-255；zh_pdf_pages=511-511；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 问汗的主要内容是：有汗无汗、汗出部位、汗出时间及汗量的多少和色质。
en: Interrogation of perspiration consists mainly of hyperhidrosis or anhidrosis, the site, time, amount, colour and nature of sweating.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.69；zh_sentence_index=5；en_sentence_index=3；en_pdf_pages=254-255；zh_pdf_pages=511-511；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 病势危重时，患者先全身战栗抖动，儿经挣扎，面后汗出者，称为战汗。
en: In a critically ill patient, sweating following sever chills involving the whole body is.called perspiration after shivering.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.73；zh_sentence_index=1；en_sentence_index=1；en_pdf_pages=256-256；zh_pdf_pages=512-512；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 若汗出热退，脉静身凉者、为正胜邪退，病情好转的佳象：若出后仍高热不退，烦躁不安，脉来急数者，是邪胜正衰，病情恶化的危候。
en: If high fever persists after sweating, accompanied by irritability and swift pulse, the disease is likely to be aggravated as a result of conquest of vital Qi by pathogens
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.73；zh_sentence_index=4；en_sentence_index=5；en_pdf_pages=256-256；zh_pdf_pages=512-512；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 其因或为风痰，或为瘀痰，或为风湿，可见于中风、痿证和瘫痪患者。
en: The pathogenic agents contributing to it may be wind-phlegm, or blood stasis phlegm, or wind-dampness, often seen in patients with apoplexy, flaccidity syndrome or paralysis.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.75；zh_sentence_index=3；en_sentence_index=3；en_pdf_pages=257-257；zh_pdf_pages=513-513；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 急性疼痛，”多为外感，痛连项背，遇风加重者，为外感风寒所致；头胀痛而面红目赤者，为外感风热而成；头重如裹伴发热恶寒者，为外感风湿所致。
en: The acute headache involving the nape and back which is aggravated by exposure to wind mostly suggests exogenous disease due to invasion of pathogenie wind-cold; distending headache accompanied by flushed complexion and conjunctival congestion is due to exogenous attack of pathogenic wind-heat, and heaviness sensation in the head like being tightly bound, accompanied by chilliness and fever, is caused by exogenous attack of pathogenic wind-dampness.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.78；zh_sentence_index=5；en_sentence_index=5；en_pdf_pages=258-259；zh_pdf_pages=514-514；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 疼痛部位不定，呈游走性者，是行痹，以风邪致病为主；疼痛剧烈，难以忍受者，为痛痹，以寒邪致病为主；痛处沉重，固定不移者，为痛痹，以湿邪致病为主；关节红肿热痛，伴发热，口渴者，为湿郁化热所致的热痹。
en: Wandering pain in the joints known as migratory arthralgia is predominantlly due to pathogenic wind; acute and intolerable pain called painful arthnalgia is mainly caused by attack of the pathogenic cold; heavy feeling of the affected area and localized pain called fixed arthralgia is due chiefly to pathogenic dampness; and redness, swelling, heat and pain of the joint, accompanied by fever and thirst, called heat-type arthralgia is due to heat transformation from dampness.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.84；zh_sentence_index=2；en_sentence_index=2；en_pdf_pages=262-263；zh_pdf_pages=515-516；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 外感风寒湿邪，多头重如裹；若人关节，则为关节沉重疼痛的痹证；湿温初起，亦必身重疼痛困倦；湿热下注，则下肢多沉重，行走困难。
en: At the early stage of dampness-warm syndrome, there must be pain and heaviness of the body, and downward flow of damp-heat may bring about the heaviness of lower limbs and difficulty in walking.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.86；zh_sentence_index=4；en_sentence_index=4；en_pdf_pages=263-263；zh_pdf_pages=516-516；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 头部刺痛，为瘀血在头，多为外伤所致；胸前刺痛，多为心血闭阻；胁肋刺痛，多为肝气久郁，血行瘀阻；少腹刺痛，又多为血瘀下焦，在女子多与月经异常有关。
en: Pricking headache suggests blood stasis in the head due mostiy to trauma, stabbing pain in the chest usually indicates obstruction of the heart blood; twinge in the hypochondrium mostly indicates long depression of liver-Qi and obstruction of blood circulation; and prickle in the lower abdomen is indicative of blood stasis in the lower-Jiao, often associated with disorders of menses in women.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.87；zh_sentence_index=2；en_sentence_index=2；en_pdf_pages=264-264；zh_pdf_pages=516-516；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 胸痛彻背，背痛彻胸，伴汗出肢冷，脉微欲绝者，为胸痹；右胁胀闷疼痛，连及右肩者，为胆肝湿热。
en: Chest pain radiating to the back or back pain to the chest, accompanied by sweating, cold limbs and faint indistinct pulse indicates chest Bi-syndrome, and distending pain in the right hypochondrium radiating to the right shoulder, is indicative of dampness and heat in the liver and gallbladder.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.92；zh_sentence_index=3；en_sentence_index=2；en_pdf_pages=265-266；zh_pdf_pages=517-517；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 脾胃不健，或其他脏器之病及于脾、都会在饮食口味上表现出来。
en: Dysfunction of the spleen and stomach or affection of the spleen by other diseases are reflected on diet and taste.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.96；zh_sentence_index=2；en_sentence_index=2；en_pdf_pages=267-268；zh_pdf_pages=518-518；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。
