zh: 口淡乏味者，为脾胃气虚；口甜粘腻者，为脾胃湿热；口中泛酸者，是肝胃郁热；口中酸腐，为伤食；口苦，多为胆火内炽。
en: Tastelessness in the mouth is caused by deficiency of the spleen-Qi and stomach-Qi; sweet taste with stickiness in the mouth suggests accumulation of dampness-heat in the spleen and stomach; sour taste in the mouth indicates the depressed heat in the liver and stomach: acid regurgitation with foul breath signifies indigestion; and, finally, bitter taste in the mouth is usually indicative of overabundance of the gallbladder-fire.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.99；zh_sentence_index=1；en_sentence_index=1；en_pdf_pages=269-269；zh_pdf_pages=519-519；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 带下色白量多，质清稀者为白带，属脾虚湿注；色黄质稠秽臭者，为黄带，为湿热下注；白带中挟有血液，为赤白带，多属肝经郁热。
en: Profuse or persistent vaginal disharge with whitish and clear tinge, called leukorrhea is seepage of dampness due to spleen-asthenia; yellowish, viscid and foul discharge from the vagina, called yellowish leukorrhagia, to downward flow of damp-heat; and leukorrhagia with blood and pus, called reddish leukorrhagia, mostly to stagnated heat of the liver channel.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.103；zh_sentence_index=3；en_sentence_index=3；en_pdf_pages=271-271；zh_pdf_pages=520-520；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 寸关尺三部的脉象，分别称为寸脉、关脉、尺脉。
en: The three pulse conditions are known as the Cun pulse, Guan pulse and Chi pulse respectively.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.108；zh_sentence_index=3；en_sentence_index=3；en_pdf_pages=273-273；zh_pdf_pages=521-521；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 但并不是说其它时间就不能诊脉。
en: However, in other times, pulse can also be felt.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.110；zh_sentence_index=3；en_sentence_index=2；en_pdf_pages=274-275；zh_pdf_pages=522-522；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 总的来说，诊脉时要求有一个安静的环境，使病人情绪稳定，气血平静，从而使诊脉更为准确。
en: Generally speaking, pulse-feeling requires a quiet environment and a patient in a calm mood with stable Qi and blood in order for an accurate diagnosis to be made.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.110；zh_sentence_index=4；en_sentence_index=3；en_pdf_pages=274-275；zh_pdf_pages=522-522；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 切脉时常运用三种轻重不同的指力来按压，体察脉象。
en: Recognition of pulse condition is made usually through applying three grades of finger forces on the three pulse regions.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.110；zh_sentence_index=14；en_sentence_index=11；en_pdf_pages=274-275；zh_pdf_pages=522-522；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 另外，平脉常随人体内外因素的变化而发生相应的生理性变化。
en: Strenuous exercise, emotional excitement, eating and drinking often cause the pulse to speed up.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.111；zh_sentence_index=11；en_sentence_index=7；en_pdf_pages=275-276；zh_pdf_pages=522-523；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 病邪郁于里，气血内困，气不外达，则脉沉而有力；如果脏腑虚弱，气血不足，脉气鼓动无力、则脉沉而无力。
en: The deep and forceful pulse indicates an interior-excess syndrome in which. the pathogens accumulate in the interior and Qi and blood are stagnated, while the deep and forceless pulse suggests an interior-deficiency syndrome, in which weakness of Zang-Fu organs and insufficiency of Qi and blood lead to inability of channel-Qi to be activated.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.116；zh_sentence_index=3；en_sentence_index=2；en_pdf_pages=277-278；zh_pdf_pages=524-524；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 《素问通评虚实论》中说："邪气盛则实"。
en: General Comment on Deficiency and Excess of Suwen says, "An excess syndrome results when the invading pathogens are exuberant.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.3；zh_sentence_span=1；en_sentence_span=1；en_pdf_pages=166-167；zh_pdf_pages=466-467；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。；替换原样本 TCM_TEST_0179；替换原因：residual_ocr_or_format_flag；候选来源=train_final_1000_cleaned.xlsx；候选id=TCM_TRAIN_0425。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 久经锻炼的运动员、脉迟而有力，则不属病脉。
en: Slow but vigorous pulse palpated in a well-trained athlete is considered as normal.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.119；zh_sentence_index=5；en_sentence_index=4；en_pdf_pages=279-279；zh_pdf_pages=524-524；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 洪脉主气分热盛，内热充斥，气盛血，脉道扩张，故脉体阔大，浮大满指、充实有力，来的力量大于去的力量。
en: Because excessiveness of heat inside the body brings about accumulation of Qi and blood and dilation of the vessels, the pulse becomes large, floating and forceful, and the beat comes vigorously and goes gently.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.131；zh_sentence_index=2；en_sentence_index=2；en_pdf_pages=283-283；zh_pdf_pages=527-527；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 如果久病气虚，或虚劳、失血、久泄等病证出现洪脉，是邪盛正衰的危候。
en: If full pulse appears in a protracted disease with consumption of Qi, loss of blood, or protracted diarrhea etc, it suggests a crisis due to violence of pathogens and deficiency of vital Qi.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.131；zh_sentence_index=3；en_sentence_index=3；en_pdf_pages=283-283；zh_pdf_pages=527-527；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 肝胆疾患使肝之疏泄失常，肝气不柔，故出现弦脉。
en: When the liver and gallbladder are troubled, the function may be impaired, losing the moderation of the liver-Qi, thereby, forming the taut pulse.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.133；zh_sentence_index=5；en_sentence_index=3；en_pdf_pages=284-284；zh_pdf_pages=528-528；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 至于风证痛证、七情惊恐、跌打损伤等出现代脉，是因病而致脉气不能衔接，不可作重证论。
en: It also appears in wind syndrome, pain syndrome, persistent and violent emotions and trauma due to suspension of channel-Qi, which should not be considered as severe conditions.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.136；zh_sentence_index=4；en_sentence_index=2；en_pdf_pages=285-285；zh_pdf_pages=528-528；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 如果脉促而细小无力，多是虚脱之象，临床上应加以注意。
en: Attention should be paid to the running, thready and weak pulse, which is indicative of prostratin syndrome.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.137；zh_sentence_index=3；en_sentence_index=4；en_pdf_pages=285-286；zh_pdf_pages=529-529；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 两个以上单一脉象共同出现所构成的脉称为相兼脉。
en: A pulse composed of two or more pulse conditions existing simultaneouly is called coexisting pulse.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.142；zh_sentence_index=1；en_sentence_index=1；en_pdf_pages=287-287；zh_pdf_pages=529-530；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 相兼脉的主病，一般地说等于组成该相兼脉的各单一脉主病的相合。
en: Generally speaking, a coexisting pulse indicates a collection of diseases that each single pulse is indicative of.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.142；zh_sentence_index=2；en_sentence_index=2；en_pdf_pages=287-287；zh_pdf_pages=529-530；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 由于败脉形象奇怪，异于一般的脉象，故又称为怪脉。
en: Since its condition is peculiar and quite different from ordinary pulse condition, it is also named strange pulse.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.143；zh_sentence_index=4；en_sentence_index=3；en_pdf_pages=287-287；zh_pdf_pages=530-530；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 元代医学家危亦林在《世医得效方》中列怪脉(即败脉)十种，称为十怪脉。
en: Wei yilin, a distinguished physician of the Yuan Dynasty, described ten strange, or moribund, pulses in his workShi Yi De Xiao Fang.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.146；zh_sentence_index=1；en_sentence_index=1；en_pdf_pages=288-288；zh_pdf_pages=530-530；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 它们是釜沸脉、鱼翔脉，虾游脉、屋漏脉、雀啄脉、解索脉、弹石脉、偃刀脉、转豆脉、麻促脉。
en: They include knife edge pulse, pea-rolling pulse and confused running pulse, in addition to the above seven moribund pulses.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.146；zh_sentence_index=2；en_sentence_index=2；en_pdf_pages=288-288；zh_pdf_pages=530-530；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 脉在皮肤，如虾游水、时面跃然而去，杳然不见，须臾又来，其急促躁动之象仍如前。
en: This refers to a nearly imperceptible pulse with occasional dartilng beats which resemble a shrimp darting in water, one of the ten moribund pulses.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.149；zh_sentence_index=1；en_sentence_index=1；en_pdf_pages=288-289；zh_pdf_pages=531-531；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 脉沉，在筋肉之下，按之坚硬，如指弹石，辟辟凑指，毫无柔和软缓之象，此乃肾气竭绝之象。
en: 'This is one of the ten moribund pulses, deep solid yet forceless, resembling flicking a stone with finger tips, which indicates exhaustion of the kidney-Qi.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.153；zh_sentence_index=1；en_sentence_index=1；en_pdf_pages=289-289；zh_pdf_pages=531-531；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 饮邪壅塞心包，亦可致虚里脉动微欲绝。
en: The blockage of the pericardium by retained fluid may also cause indistinct Xuli pulse.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.158；zh_sentence_index=5；en_sentence_index=4；en_pdf_pages=292-292；zh_pdf_pages=532-533；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 此外，还可以通过指压俞穴作试验性治疗，从而协助鉴别诊断。
en: In addition, palpation of acupoints may also be applied in a tentative treatment for the purpose of differential diagnosis.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.161；zh_sentence_index=8；en_sentence_index=5；en_pdf_pages=293-294；zh_pdf_pages=533-534；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 如胆道蛔虫引起的腹痛，指压，双侧胆俞穴疼痛可缓解，其他原因引起的腹痛则无效，以资鉴别。
en: For instance, pressing bilateral Danshu (B 39) points can relieve abdominal pain due to biliary ascariasis, but proves of no effect in other cases of abdominal pain.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.161；zh_sentence_index=9；en_sentence_index=6；en_pdf_pages=293-294；zh_pdf_pages=533-534；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 其特点是起病急，病位浅，病情较轻，病程较短，一般不影响脏腑的功能。
en: It is sudden in onset, superficial and mild in nature, and short in duration without affecting the function of Zang-Fu organs in most cases.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.3；zh_sentence_index=2；en_sentence_index=2；en_pdf_pages=294-295；zh_pdf_pages=534-534；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 概括地说，凡非表证的一切证候皆属里证。
en: In general, it includes almost all the syndromes other than the exterior syndrome.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.4；zh_sentence_index=3；en_sentence_index=2；en_pdf_pages=295-295；zh_pdf_pages=534-534；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 里证可因表证进一步发展，表邪入里而成；也可因外邪直接侵犯脏腑而成；还可因情志内伤、饮食劳倦等因素，直接影响脏腑功能，而形成里证。
en: The interior syndrome may be produced by the exogenous pathogons which either enter the interior from the superficies or directly invade the Zang-Fu organs; or by some other factors, such as emotional upset, improper diet or overstrain, which affect the functions of Zang-Fu organs.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.4；zh_sentence_index=4；en_sentence_index=3；en_pdf_pages=295-295；zh_pdf_pages=534-534；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 凡表证不解，内传入里，或先有表证，后出现里证，而表证完全消失者，均称为表证入里。
en: It refers to the invasion of pathogens from the superficial part of the body to the deep, or the replacement of exterior syndrome by interior one.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.5；zh_sentence_index=1；en_sentence_index=1；en_pdf_pages=295-295；zh_pdf_pages=534-535；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 寒热错杂证是指同一个病人身上，既有热证，又有寒证，寒证与热证同时存在。
en: It means that cold syndrome is intertwined with heat syndrome in one and the same patient.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.11；zh_sentence_index=1；en_sentence_index=1；en_pdf_pages=297-298；zh_pdf_pages=536-536；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 疾病初起时表现为寒证，然后出现热证，热证出现之后，寒证消失，此为寒证转化为热证。
en: For example, a disease at its onset manifests itself by cold syndrome followed by heat syndrome, and the former vanishes as soon as the latter appears.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.12；zh_sentence_index=3；en_sentence_index=2；en_pdf_pages=298-298；zh_pdf_pages=536-536；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 如外感风寒之邪，表现为发热恶寒，无汗，头身痛，舌苔薄白，脉浮紧等，病变进一步发展，恶寒等症消失，而发热不退，不恶寒反恶热，并且心烦，口渴，舌苔黄等症状相继出现，此为表寒证转化为里热证。
en: This is what is known as transformation of cold syndrome into heat syndrome, as in the case of exterior cold syndrome due to exogenous pathogens, marked by such symptoms as fever, chilly sensation, no sweat, headache, general aching, thin whitish fur of the tongue, tense floating pulse, etc.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.12；zh_sentence_index=4；en_sentence_index=3；en_pdf_pages=298-298；zh_pdf_pages=536-536；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 如高热病人，由于失治或误治，使正气大伤，邪毒太盛，可突然出现四肢厥冷，冷汗淋漓，精神萎靡，脉微欲绝等症。
en: This is what is called transformation of heat syndrome into cold syndrome, as in the case of a patient with high fever who, due to delayed treatment or misdiagnosis, may be overcome by pathogenic factor which prevails over vital Qi and suddenly develops such symptoms as cold limbs, profuse cold sweat, listlessness, and faint indistinct pulse.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.12；zh_sentence_index=6；en_sentence_index=5；en_pdf_pages=298-298；zh_pdf_pages=536-536；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 临床表现为手足逆冷，脉沉，表象是寒证，但病人肢冷而身热，不恶寒反恶热，脉沉但数而有力。
en: It is different from cold syndrome in that the patient's body is warm in spite of cold limbs, and he or she has an aversion to heat instead of cold, and his or her pulse is deep, but also rapid and forceful.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.13；zh_sentence_index=3；en_sentence_index=2；en_pdf_pages=299-299；zh_pdf_pages=536-537；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 如饮食失调，使后天之本不固；七情劳倦，内伤脏腑气血，房室过度，耗伤肾脏元真之气，或久病不愈，损伤正气，均可形成虚证。
en: For example. improper diet may lead to weakness of the physique; emotional upsets. may impair Qi and blood of Zang-Fu organs; sexual indulgence may consume the kidney Qi; and prolonged illness may impair vital Qi.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.16；zh_sentence_index=3；en_sentence_index=2；en_pdf_pages=300-300；zh_pdf_pages=537-538；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 临证时应仔细辨别虚实缓急，正确指导治疗。
en: Treatment must vary, depending on the type the syndrome pertains to.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.18；zh_sentence_index=3；en_sentence_index=5；en_pdf_pages=301-301；zh_pdf_pages=538-538；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 例如脾肺气虚，由于运化失职，宣降失常，以致形成痰饮、水湿等实邪。
en: For example, deficiency of the spleen-Qi and lung-Qi leads to dysfunction of the spleen and lungs manifested by formation of substantial pathogens, such as phlegm, fluidrelention, water and dampness.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.20；zh_sentence_index=2；en_sentence_index=3；en_pdf_pages=302-302；zh_pdf_pages=538-538；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 本为虚弱病证，却出现类似实证的表现，这样的证候就是真虚假实证。
en: It is a syndrome of deficiency type, but accompanied by symptoms similar to excess syndrome.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.22；zh_sentence_index=1；en_sentence_index=1；en_pdf_pages=303-303；zh_pdf_pages=539-539；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 说明脏腑气血不足是疾病的本质，而类似实证的表现却是假象，这就是真虚假实证。
en: However, upon careful examination it may be found that abdominal distension, which is not persistent, now slight, now severe, can be relieved by pressure, and that the patient's pulse is taut but weak, indicating that insufficiency of Qi and blood of Zang-Fu organs is the real essence of disease, whereas symptoms similar to excess syndrome are but false phenomena.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.22；zh_sentence_index=4；en_sentence_index=4；en_pdf_pages=303-303；zh_pdf_pages=539-539；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 表实证是指外邪侵袭肌表，腠理密闭所出现的证候、临床表现为发热恶寒、头身疼痛，鼻塞，无汗，脉浮紧。
en: It is a syndrome resulting from tight closure of striae of tho skin and muscles due to invasion of the superficies by exogenous pathogens manifested by fever, chills, headache, general aching, stuffy nose, no sweat, and tense floating pulse.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.23；zh_sentence_index=1；en_sentence_index=1；en_pdf_pages=303-303；zh_pdf_pages=539-539；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 其具体的证候表现以及病因、病机、治疗等已述于其他六纲之中。
en: The manifestations, etiology. pathogenesis and treatment of the six principal syndromes have already been dealt with respectively in the previous sections.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.27；zh_sentence_index=2；en_sentence_index=3；en_pdf_pages=305-305；zh_pdf_pages=540-540；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 气血津液辨证就是运用脏腑学说中有关气血津液的理论，分析气、血、津液的病变，辨认其不同证候类型的一种辨证方法。
en: State of Qi, Blood and Body Fluid It is a diagnostic method with which to analyse the pathologic changes of Qi, blood and body fluid, and identify the nature of a disease according to the part of Zang-Fu doctrine dealing with Qi, blood and body fluid.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.28；zh_sentence_index=1；en_sentence_index=1；en_pdf_pages=305-305；zh_pdf_pages=540-540；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 气逆多发生在肺、胃、肝等脏腑，所以气逆证多指肺气上逆，胃气上逆以及肝气升发太过而致的肝气上逆诸证候。
en: This syndrome is mostly used to denote functional disturbance of the lungs, stomach and liver, for it often iinvolves these organs.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.32；zh_sentence_index=2；en_sentence_index=2；en_pdf_pages=307-307；zh_pdf_pages=541-541；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 肺气上逆表现为咳嗽，喘促；胃气上逆表现为呃逆、嗳气、恶心、呕吐；肝气上逆表现为头目胀痛，眩晕，甚至昏厥，呕血。
en: Abnormal ascending of the lung-Qi is manifested as cough and dyspnea; that of the stomach-Qi as hiccup, belching, nausea and vomiting; and that of the liver-Qi as distending pain of the head and eyes, dizziness, or even syncope and hematemesis.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.32；zh_sentence_index=3；en_sentence_index=3；en_pdf_pages=307-307；zh_pdf_pages=541-541；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 气滞血瘀证是由于气机郁滞，气滞不行而引起的血瘀证，主要与情态不遂，七情所伤，肝失疏泄有关。
en: It refers to blood stasis due to stagnation and depression of Qi, related mainly todysfunction of the liver caused by emotional upsets.

entities.en: stagnation of Qi and blood stasis

note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.36；zh_sentence_index=1；en_sentence_index=1；en_pdf_pages=308-309；zh_pdf_pages=542-542；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 津液不足证是指津液亏少、全身或某些脏腑组织器官失其濡润滋养而表现出的证候。
en: It refers to a morbid condition due to insufficiency of body fluid which leads to its inability to nourish the whole body or some Zang-Fu organs.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.40；zh_sentence_index=1；en_sentence_index=1；en_pdf_pages=310-310；zh_pdf_pages=543-543；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 寒痰证是指寒邪与痰互结而导致的病证，以及痰盛而有寒象的证候。
en: It is a syndrome caused by pathogenic cold combined with phlegm, and by abundant expectoration accompanied by cold manifestations.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.43；zh_sentence_index=1；en_sentence_index=1；en_pdf_pages=311-311；zh_pdf_pages=544-544；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 临床所应用的辨证方法是多种多样的，而且各有特点，但若要确切地辨明疾病的部位、性质，并指导治疗，则必须落实到脏腑上，所以说脏腑辨证是其它各种辨证的基础。
en: Since the methods of differential diagnosis employed in clinical practice are many and varied, each having its own characteristics, they must first be applied to Zang-Fu organs so as to definitely determine the site and nature of a disease and adopt a treatment accordingly.

entities.en: differential diagnosis according to theory of Zang-Fu organs

note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.50；zh_sentence_index=2；en_sentence_index=3；en_pdf_pages=313-313；zh_pdf_pages=545-545；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 脾不统血证是脾气亏虚，不能统摄血液所表现的证候。
en: It is a syndrome of inability of the spleen to keep blood flowing within the vessels owing to insufficiency of the spleen-Qi.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.71；zh_sentence_index=1；en_sentence_index=1；en_pdf_pages=321-322；zh_pdf_pages=550-550；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 肝气郁结证是肝失疏泄，气机郁滞所表现的证候。
en: This is a syndrome characterized by inability of the liver to disperse Qi.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.78；zh_sentence_index=1；en_sentence_index=1；en_pdf_pages=324-325；zh_pdf_pages=552-552；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 肝火上炎证是肝经气火上逆所表现的证候。
en: This is a syndrome marked by adverse rising of Qi and fire from theliver.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.79；zh_sentence_index=1；en_sentence_index=1；en_pdf_pages=325-325；zh_pdf_pages=552-552；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 临床表现为头晕胀痛，面红目赤，口苦口干，急躁易怒，失眠或恶梦纷纭，胁肋灼痛，便秘尿赤，或耳鸣如潮，或耳内肿痛流脓，或吐血衄血，舌红苔黄，脉弦数。
en: Its clinical manifestations are: dizziness, distending headache, flushed face, conjunctival congestion, bitter taste, dry mouth, restlessness and irritability, insomnia, nightmare, burning pain in the hypochondrium, constipation, dark urine, tinnitus, otopyorrhea, hematemesis, epistaxis, red tongue with yellow fur, and taut rapid pulse.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.79；zh_sentence_index=3；en_sentence_index=3；en_pdf_pages=325-325；zh_pdf_pages=552-552；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 肾精不足证是肾精亏损表现出的证候。
en: This refers to a syndrome due to consumption of the kidney-essence.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.90；zh_sentence_index=1；en_sentence_index=1；en_pdf_pages=330-330；zh_pdf_pages=555-555；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 心肾不交证是心肾水火既济失调所表现的证候。
en: This is a morbid condition attributable to inccordination between water (the kidneys) and ire (the heart).
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.92；zh_sentence_index=1；en_sentence_index=1；en_pdf_pages=331-331；zh_pdf_pages=555-555；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 临床表现为咳嗽痰少，或痰中带血，口燥咽干，或声音嘶哑，形体消瘦，腰膝酸软，骨蒸潮热，颧红盗汗，男子遗精，女妇月经不调，舌红少苔，脉细数。
en: Its clinical manifestations are: cough with scanty sputum or blood-tinged sputum, dry throat and mouth, hoarseness. emaciation, weakness of the loins and knees, hectic and regular recurrent fever, flushed cheeks, night sweating, seminal emission in males, irregular menstruation in females, red tongue with little fur, and thready rapid pulse.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.96；zh_sentence_index=3；en_sentence_index=3；en_pdf_pages=333-333；zh_pdf_pages=556-556；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 临床表现为头晕目眩，耳鸣如蝉，胁痛隐隐，健忘失眠，腰膝酸软，口干咽燥，五心烦热，额红盗汗，男子遗精，女子月经量少，舌红少苔，脉细数。
en: Its clinical menifestations are: Dizziness, tinnitus resembling the sound of a cicada, dull pain in the hypochondium, amnesia, insomnia, weakness of the loins and knees, dry throat and mouth, dysphoria wih feverish sensation in the chest, palms and soles, flushed cheeks, night sweating, seminal emission in males, scanty menstruation in females, red tongue with little fur and thready rapid pulse.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.97；zh_sentence_index=3；en_sentence_index=3；en_pdf_pages=333-334；zh_pdf_pages=556-556；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 脾肺气虚证是脾肺两脏气虚所表现的证候。
en: This syndrome refers to insufficiency of the spleen-Qi and the lung-Qi.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.99；zh_sentence_index=1；en_sentence_index=1；en_pdf_pages=335-335；zh_pdf_pages=557-557；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 肝脾不调证是肝失疏泄，脾失健运所表现出的证候。
en: This syndrome is the result of stagnation of the liver-Qi and dysfunction of the spleen in transport.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.100；zh_sentence_index=1；en_sentence_index=1；en_pdf_pages=335-335；zh_pdf_pages=557-557；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 肝胃不和证是肝失疏泄，胃失和降而表现出的证候。
en: This syndrome is indicative of dysfunction of both the liver and the stomach.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.101；zh_sentence_index=1；en_sentence_index=1；en_pdf_pages=336-336；zh_pdf_pages=557-557；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 肝火犯肺证是肝经气火上逆犯肺、肺失清肃而表现出的证候。
en: This is a syndrome due to upward invasion of the lungs by the Qi and fire in the liver leading to pulmonary dysfunction in purification and descent.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.103；zh_sentence_index=1；en_sentence_index=1；en_pdf_pages=336-337；zh_pdf_pages=558-558；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 由于情志不遂，肝气郁结，气郁化火，或邪热蕴结肝经，郁而化火，上逆犯肺而致。
en: It usually results from the fire produced by the stagnation of the liver-Qi due to emotional depression or from invasion of the lungs by the adverse rising fire produced by the stagnation of pathogenic heat in the liver channel.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.103；zh_sentence_index=2；en_sentence_index=2；en_pdf_pages=336-337；zh_pdf_pages=558-558；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 临床表现为腹满而呕，食欲不振，自利，口不渴，时腹自痛，舌苔白，脉缓弱。
en: Its clinical manifestations are: abdominal fullness, vomiting, anorexia, diarrhea, no thirst, frequent abdominal pain, whitish fur on the tongue, weak and moderate pulse.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.112；zh_sentence_index=2；en_sentence_index=2；en_pdf_pages=342-343；zh_pdf_pages=560-561；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 《素问通评虚实论》说："精气夺则虚。
en: The chapter Tong Ping Xu Shi Lun Treatise on General Comment of Deficiency and Excess of Suwen also points out: "Exhaustion of vital essence brings about deficiency syndrome.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.4；zh_sentence_span=1；en_sentence_span=1；en_pdf_pages=167-167；zh_pdf_pages=467-467；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。；替换原样本 TCM_TEST_0233；替换原因：residual_ocr_or_format_flag；候选来源=train_final_1000_cleaned.xlsx；候选id=TCM_TRAIN_0430。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 热入血分则身热；热扰神明则躁扰不安，神昏谵语；热盛动血则斑疹透露，吐血，衄血，便血；热盛动风则抽搐惊厥。
en: In case of invasion of blood by excessive heat, there may appear skin eruptions, hemoptysis, epistaxis, and hematochezia, In case of wind-syndrome due to excessive heat, convulsion and syncope happen as a result.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.121；zh_sentence_index=6；en_sentence_index=5；en_pdf_pages=348-349；zh_pdf_pages=563-563；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 由于湿与脾胃有密切关系，故上焦湿热证除有表证外，往往兼有湿困脾胃和湿阻肌肉的表现。
en: Since pathogenic dampness is closely related to the spleen and stomach, there also appears the syndrome of disturbance of the spleen and stomach due to invasion by pathogenic dampness and its retention in the muscles, besides the exterior-sydnrome.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.123；zh_sentence_index=2；en_sentence_index=2；en_pdf_pages=349-350；zh_pdf_pages=564-564；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 由于疾病的发生关系到正气与邪气两个方面，故预防疾病的发生，必须从提高正气的抗邪能力与防止病邪的侵害两方面入手。
en: Since the occurrence of a disease iinvolves both the vital Qi and pathogenic factors, prevention of a disease must start with enhancing the resistance of vital Qi to pathogenic factors and with preventing the invasion of the human body by pathogens.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.2；zh_sentence_index=2；en_sentence_index=2；en_pdf_pages=352-353；zh_pdf_pages=565-565；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 又称从治法，是顺从疾病假象而治的一种特殊治疗原则。
en: It is a specific therapeutic principle regarding treatment of a disease in accordance with its false signs.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.12；zh_sentence_index=1；en_sentence_index=1；en_pdf_pages=357-358；zh_pdf_pages=567-568；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 即以热治热，是指用热性药物治疗具有假热症状的病证。
en: It is a method for the treatment of pseudo-heat syndromes with drugs of hot nature.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.13；zh_sentence_index=1；en_sentence_index=1；en_pdf_pages=358-358；zh_pdf_pages=568-568；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 即以寒治寒，是指用寒性药物治疗具有假寒症状的病证。
en: It is a method of treating pseudo-cold diseases with drugs of cold nature.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.14；zh_sentence_index=1；en_sentence_index=1；en_pdf_pages=358-359；zh_pdf_pages=568-568；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 如热厥证，出现四肢厥冷，脉沉，很似寒证，但有壮热心烦，小便短赤等。
en: For example, the symptom of cold limbs due to excess of heat marked by cold limbs and deep pulse seems to be cold-syndrome, but is accompanied by high fever, feeling of restlessness over the chest, scanty dark urine, etc.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.14；zh_sentence_index=3；en_sentence_index=3；en_pdf_pages=358-359；zh_pdf_pages=568-568；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 即是扶助正气，提高人体的抗邪能力。
en: To support vital Qi is to strengthen body resistance.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.21；zh_sentence_index=1；en_sentence_index=1；en_pdf_pages=363-363；zh_pdf_pages=570-570；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 由于邪正斗争的胜负，决定着疾病的进退，因而扶助正气，改变邪正双方的力量对比，使疾病向痊愈方向转化，是临床治疗的重要法则之一。
en: Since victory or failure in the struggle between vital Qi and pathogens determines the development or termination of a disease, one of the important principles underlying clinical therapy is to change the relative strength of vital Qi and pathogens, making the illness take a turn for the better.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.21；zh_sentence_index=2；en_sentence_index=2；en_pdf_pages=363-363；zh_pdf_pages=570-570；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 扶正多用补虚之法，适用于以正气虚为主要矛盾，而邪气也不盛或已衰的虚性病证。
en: To support vital Qi is to restore vital Qi in most cases, which is indicated in deficiency syndrome, in which deficiency of vital Qi is the primary contradiction, whilc pathogens are not dominant or have been declining.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.21；zh_sentence_index=3；en_sentence_index=3；en_pdf_pages=363-363；zh_pdf_pages=570-570；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 此时若兼以祛邪，反更伤正气，故应先扶正后祛邪，而不用扶正兼祛邪之法。
en: In this case, if the method of eliminating pathogens is simultaneously applied, vital Qi will be further damaged instead of being supported.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.25；zh_sentence_index=2；en_sentence_index=2；en_pdf_pages=366-366；zh_pdf_pages=571-571；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 人体是一个有机整体，脏与脏、脏与腑、腑与腑之间在生理上是相互协调、相互促进的，在病理上则是相互影响的。
en: The human body is an organic whole, in which Zang-organs and Fu-organs coordinate and promote each other physiologically and interact on each other pathologically.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.30；zh_sentence_index=1；en_sentence_index=1；en_pdf_pages=369-370；zh_pdf_pages=572-573；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 当某一脏腑发生病变时，常会影响别的脏腑功能。
en: When any of the Zang-Fu organs doesn't function well, all the other organs may be affected.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.30；zh_sentence_index=2；en_sentence_index=2；en_pdf_pages=369-370；zh_pdf_pages=572-573；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 因此，在治疗脏腑病变时，不能单纯考虑一个脏腑，而应注意调整各脏腑之间的关系。
en: Thus, when treating a disorder of any Zang-Fu organ, we consider not merely the diseased organ alone, but take into account the interrelationship between all Zang-Fu organs instead.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.30；zh_sentence_index=3；en_sentence_index=3；en_pdf_pages=369-370；zh_pdf_pages=572-573；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 如肺脏病变，即可因本脏受邪而发病，亦可因心、肝、脾、肾及大肠的病变所引起。
en: For instance, a disorder of the lungs may result either from an attack of pathogens on themselves or from dysfunction of the heart, liver, spleen, kidneys and the large intestine.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.30；zh_sentence_index=4；en_sentence_index=4；en_pdf_pages=369-370；zh_pdf_pages=572-573；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: "所谓虚，主要指正气不足，是以正气虚为矛盾主要方面的病理反映。
en: " By syndrome of deficiency nature is meant deficient vital Qi, or a pathological reaction with deficient vital Qi, as the principal aspect of the contradiction.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.4；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=167-167；zh_pdf_pages=467-467；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。；替换原样本 TCM_TEST_0249；替换原因：residual_ocr_or_format_flag；候选来源=train_final_1000_cleaned.xlsx；候选id=TCM_TRAIN_0431。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 根据病人年龄、性别、体质、生活习惯等不同特点，来考虑治疗用药的原则，称为因人制宜。
en: The therapeutical principle underlying administration of drugs according to age, sex, physique, different modes of living of patients etc. is known as treatment in accordance with constitution of an individual.

entities.en: treatment in accordance with constitution of an individual

note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.35；zh_sentence_index=1；en_sentence_index=1；en_pdf_pages=373-374；zh_pdf_pages=574-577；与dev去重；未选第2章阴阳五行，过滤含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子；OCR清洗后句子级对齐。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。
